title: Allogene Therapeutics Announces Publication of Durable Response Data from Phase 1 ALPHA/ALPHA2 Trials of the Allogeneic CAR T Cemacabtagene Ansegedleucel/ALLO-501 in Relapsed/Refractory Large B-Cell Lymphoma in the Journal of Clinical Oncology
text: Allogene announced publication of comprehensive Phase 1 ALPHA/ALPHA2 trial data in the Journal of Clinical Oncology (JCO), a leading peer-reviewed medical journal. The publication detailed durable response data from the Phase 1 trials of cemacabtagene ansegedleucel (cema-cel) in relapsed/refractory large B-cell lymphoma patients. The published data represented the most robust allogeneic CAR T experience to date, showing durable complete remissions in a substantial fraction of heavily pretreated patients. This publication provided important scientific validation for Allogene's lead program ahead of the Phase 2 ALPHA3 trial.
